name: ginkgolide C
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: platelet-activating factor receptor antagonism with additional anti-inflammatory signaling reported in cell and animal models.
contraindications: No isolated-compound clinical interaction set established
summary: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: platelet-activating factor receptor antagonism with additional anti-inflammatory signaling reported in cell and animal models.
